allow: PowerShell(Get-Command node, npm, pnpm, yarn -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Name, Source; Write-Host "---"; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name -First 5; Write-Host "---"; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {$_.Name -match "node|fnm|nvm"} | Select-Object Name; Write-Host "---"; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\npm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name -First 3)
